title: OSP Profile: Cleaning Services v1
description: Vocabulary for facility and specialty cleaning: the parameters that actually determine whether a provider can take on a site, as opposed to generic service attributes. Covers maintenance cleaning, deep cleaning, post-construction, specialty environments (medical, food service, cleanrooms), and access/waste constraints.

service_types.description: Categories of cleaning work offered. Agents should filter on this before any further comparison.

specializations.description: Environments the provider is trained and equipped for. Medical and cleanroom work requires specific competencies that generic providers do not have.

area_range_m2.description: Floor area range the provider serves per site, in square metres. A national chain and a two-person crew differ here by orders of magnitude.

surface_types.description: Surfaces the provider is equipped to handle, including ones requiring specific methods (natural stone, epoxy, polished concrete).

cleanroom_iso_class.description: Highest ISO 14644-1 cleanroom class the provider can service (lower number = stricter). Omit if cleanroom work is not offered.

chemical_standards.description: Classification of cleaning agents used. Decisive for medical, food, and environmentally regulated sites.

waste_handling.description: Waste classes the provider is authorised to collect and dispose of. Most generic providers handle only 'general' and 'recycling_separated'.

access_models.description: How the provider's staff gains site access. Important for after-hours cleaning and secured facilities.

time_windows.description: When cleaning can be performed. Many office clients require strictly out-of-hours work.

staff_vetting_level.description: Highest vetting level applied to assigned staff. Required by regulated industries (finance, defense, medical).

languages_on_site.description: Languages spoken by on-site personnel. Often omitted but important for facilities with safety instructions in specific languages.

eco_certifications.description: Organisational certifications held by the provider. Distinct from product-level chemical standards above.

insurance_coverage_chf.description: Public liability insurance coverage in CHF (or local equivalent). Sites handling valuables or sensitive assets set minimums here.

minimum_engagement_value.description: Smallest order the provider accepts, in the currency of their manifest. Prevents matching against jobs below economic threshold.
